text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yesterday, I received some pickled vegetables
from my hometown, and as I was eating them, I
felt strangely uplifted.
choice_data_list: Probably because it was such a heartfelt gift.
Probably because it was such a heartfelt gift.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That must be it. It was a reminder of all the
support I receive from back home.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I've got a feeling that I'm gonna run well in my
next race. I'll win this one—I promise.

Seeing Oguri Cap so motivated gives me high
hopes for the upcoming race.
